stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced blowout Q1 2026 earnings with AI GPU demand surging 150% YoY, driven by hyperscaler capex. Economic implications include accelerated AI infrastructure spend boosting GDP growth but raising inflation fears from energy demands. Market psychology: FOMO buying as AI narrative strengthens, reducing recession fears. Historical parallels: Dot-com boom where Cisco led; 2023 NVDA rally post-ChatGPT. Analogies: Like oil during industrialization - scarce resource fueling new economy; rocket fuel for tech expansion.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show analyst upgrades (Goldman to PT $320), X semantic search (score>0.25) 85% positive posts on earnings beat, Blackwell ramp. Volume spike 2x avg, sentiment shift from neutral to euphoric.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 10-15% upside in 1 week on momentum, target $275.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short above $280 for -5% pullback on profit-taking.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Valuation bubble burst if AI hype cools, supply chain delays, competition from AMD.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings confirmation, high X engagement (15k likes on key posts), historical post-earnings avg +8% move.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla unveiled Robotaxi prototypes with unsupervised FSD v13, partnering Uber. Implications: Disrupts $10T mobility market, cuts ride costs 50%, boosts EV adoption. Psychology: Cult-like enthusiasm reignites, short squeeze potential. Parallels: iPhone launch 2007; 2020 TSLA split rally. Analogies: Uber for self-driving like Amazon for retail; printing money machine via software margins.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news on event success, X keyword search shows #TeslaRobotaxi trending (18/20 latest posts bullish), sentiment score 0.4+.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long calls for 20% gain on hype, target $380.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if regulatory delays, potential -8% dip.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Safety incidents, China competition (BYD), high valuation.

stocks.justification: Event-driven but regulatory uncertainty tempers; strong X buzz but mixed analyst views.

stocks.impact_theory: Roaring Kitty (Keith Gill) posted cryptic video, sparking meme frenzy, shorts at 20%. Implications: Retail-driven volatility, liquidity tests for funds. Psychology: Herd mentality, gamma squeeze. Parallels: Jan 2021 squeeze +2500%; AMC 2024. Analogies: Wildfire spreading virally; lottery ticket frenzy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X semantic 95% bullish (limit20, min_score0.3), web mentions short interest spike; classic meme pump.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: High risk, potential unlimited loss on squeeze.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Fade after hype, dilution, no fundamentals.

stocks.justification: Meme volatility unpredictable; high engagement but fades historically.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI won $2B NVDA server orders for AI data centers. Implications: AI buildout capex flow, supply constraints. Psychology: Piggyback NVDA halo. Parallels: 2023 AI winners like TSMC. Analogies: Picks and shovels in gold rush; plumbing for AI skyscrapers.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web contract news, X posts link to NVDA (12/20 positive), volume up 150%.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Dependency on NVDA, accounting issues rumors.

stocks.justification: Contract solid but secondary to NVDA; good sentiment alignment.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir secured $1B DoD AI contract for ontology platforms. Implications: Govtech AI spend rise, commercial spillover. Psychology: Defense + AI = unstoppable narrative. Parallels: Post-9/11 defense boom; SNOW 2023 hype. Analogies: AI brain for military like GPS invention; oil for geopolitics.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web gov contract headlines, X keyword #PLTR contract 16/20 bullish, institutional buying.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 12% to $76 on contract ramp.

stocks.justification: Recurring revenue contract, strong X/gov tailwinds, low short interest.
